_contextSnippet: For ROC analysis, SUV and other first-order parameters, second-order entropy and all high-order parameters showed ability to discriminate...SUVmax showed the highest AUROC at 1.5 h (0.992)
details: Used for ROC analysis demonstrating discriminatory ability of various parameters, with SUVmax achieving AUROC of 0.992 at 1.5h and 0.996 at 4h
